name: Kratom
summary: Kratom entry from SciSpace evidence pass. Evidence level: insufficient clinical.
description: Kratom is cataloged as opioid-active botanical. Reported mechanisms: mitragynine/7-hydroxymitragynine partial mu-opioid receptor agonism; adrenergic/serotonergic activity preclinical.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
